messages.content: Event system for cpp
But can you have two variadic template parameters for system?
Can you integrate it into the system class?
It says 	the '(' and ')' was unexpected	using EventTypePointer = void()(const EventType&);
Can you give an example of a movementsystem that sends out an event when an entity's x-position is greater than 500, to be received by a collisionsystem, adapted from my implementation of system.
